20:05 â March 4, 2020
AFT Clearing File Specifications for Ontario
Reference documents for the Ontario AFT clearing file specifications are now available on the Secure Site. The specifications are for existing clearing files in Ontario and there are no changes. They are published for the purpose of maintaining consistency with Central 1âs standard of providing file specifications for all regions.
Central 1 provides the AFT clearing files for financial institutions to post transactions to the membersâ accounts. This includes all transactions that relate to direct deposit and pre-authorized debit transactions originated either by the financial institution (for a financial institution member or business member) or by another financial institution for delivery to the financial institution (for a financial institution member or business member). The USD Clearing File for Returns (UNRT) and the CAD Clearing File for Returns (ONRT) are optional files.
We updated the Payment Solutions Manual to reflect this change.
